name: Archive.org
description: A digital library offering free universal access to books, movies, software, music, and more than 866 billion web pages.

name: Netflix
description: A premier subscription-based streaming service featuring a vast library of award-winning Netflix originals, feature films, and documentaries.

name: YouTube
description: The world's largest video-sharing platform, hosting everything from professional music videos and movies to independent creator content.

name: Disney Plus
description: The dedicated streaming home for movies and shows from Disney, Pixar, Marvel, Star Wars, and National Geographic.

name: Amazon Prime Video
description: A comprehensive streaming service offering popular movies, TV shows, and Amazon Original series, with options to rent or buy new releases.

name: Hulu
description: A leading streaming platform known for providing next-day access to major network TV shows, original series, and a deep movie library.
